reference: Abedi, Dvali, et al. 2017, arXiv:1612.00266, Eq.2 / Table I; Cardoso & Pani reviews
verdict: leg 8's echo spacing (Damour–Solodukhin, Δt≈−8M·ln λ) shares its leading-order log form with the Abedi Kerr-tortoise round-trip, which reproduces Abedi 2017 Table I to 98.5–99.7% on 3 real events with no tuned parameter — the literature anchor for leg 8, parallel to Move B's QNM↔Leaver.
